title: Level 5 Announces Pufflings Puzzle Game for Smartphones
content: Level 5 announced during its LEVEL5 VISION 2026 Craftsmanship stream the new Pufflings: Journey Through a Fantasy World ( Gensō Sekai no Puchi Poyon ) game for smartphones, scheduled for release this winter.
author: ANN

title: Solo Leveling’s New Character Gets a New Story Amid Season 3 Delay
content: The wait for Solo Leveling Season 3 is longer than ever as the animation studio stays silent on the anime’s future. In the meantime, Solo Leveling: Ragnarok has also been on an indefinite hiatus following the artist’s enlistment in mandatory military service, which typically lasts for 18 to 21 months.
author: ComicBook

title: Yen Press Announces New Avocado House Imprint for International Authors in Translation
content: Yen Press announced on Monday the new imprint Avocado House for international authors in translation. Publisher and editor-in-chief JuYoun Lee is the creator and curator of Avocado House. The company aims to initially release 12 titles per year. The company opened a website for Avocado House.
author: ANN

title: Jujutsu Kaisen Studio Returns For Video Game Crossover
content: Studio MAPPA has had a wildly busy year so far, with Jujutsu Kaisen’s third season and Hell’s Paradise’s second season ending strongly. Most recently, the production house returned to an anime adaptation that many never expected to make a comeback, as Dorohedoro’s second season arrived on Netflix.
author: ComicBook

title: Beyblade X Anime Reveals Double Episode Premiere, Ending Theme Song for New Arc
content: The official X/Twitter account for the Beyblade franchise announced on Friday that the "True Future Arc" for the anime of Takara Tomy 's Beyblade X project will begin streaming on April 17 with both the 123rd and 124th episodes. Boy band Aoen will perform the ending theme song "Youth" for the new episodes.
author: ANN

title: Toshl Remixes Original Fist of the North Star Series' Opening Theme Song for New Anime's Ending
content: Warner Bros. Japan began revealed on Saturday that Toshl is performing the ending theme song for Hokuto no Ken -Fist of the North Star- , the new anime Tetsuo Hara 's landmark manga Fist of the North Star ( Hokuto no Ken ), and it is a remix of Crystal King 's opening theme song "Ai o Torimodose!!" from the original…
author: ANN

title: Fantasy Life i: The Girl Who Steals Time Game Gets iOS, Android Versions
content: Level 5 announced during its LEVEL5 VISION 2026 Craftsmanship stream on Friday that it will release its Fantasy Life i: The Girl Who Steals Time game for iOS and Android this summer. The game features cross-play and cross-saves.
author: ANN

title: Google Has Banned a Controversial Anime-Themed Game
content: The worlds of video games and anime have gone together over the years like chocolate and peanut butter, with many video games receiving anime adaptations and vice versa. In some cases, various digital entries have taken the aesthetic of the anime medium to forge brand new universes.
author: ComicBook

title: Snack World Game Gets 'Reloaded' Remake for Switch 2, PS5, PC
content: Level 5 announced during its LEVEL5 VISION 2026 Craftsmanship stream on Friday that its Snack World: The Dungeon Crawl - Gold ( The Snack World : Trejarers ) game is getting a remake titled Snack World: Reloaded for Nintendo Switch 2, PlayStation 5, and PC via Steam .
author: ANN

title: Netflix Cancels Plans For Beloved Animated Franchise From Over The Garden Wall Creator
content: Animation has become a major part of the entertainment world for as long as the medium has existed, and this fact is even more true in the streaming era. Platforms like Hulu, HBO Max, and Disney+ have both housed classic animated projects and created scores of original animated programming.
author: ComicBook
